tree.name: Day'Ron Sharpe
tree.tradeDescription: Nets traded Landry Shamet to Suns for Jevon Carter and Day'Ron Sharpe. Brooklyn also received a trade exception.
tree.note: UNC big man, #29 pick in 2021. Originally drafted by PHX, traded to BKN same offseason. Re-signed as FA in 2025 (2yr/$12M).

assetsGivenUp.name: Landry Shamet
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: BKN traded Jay Scrubb to LAC; BKN traded Saddiq Bey, Jaylen Hands, Dzanan Musa, and 2021 2nd (TOR own, became JT Thor) to DET; DET traded Bruce Brown to BKN; DET traded Luke Kennard, Justin Patton, and 4 2nd-rounders to LAC; LAC traded Reggie Perry and Landry Shamet to BKN; LAC traded Rodney McGruder and cash to DET.
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard/wing acquired from Clippers in massive 3-team deal on draft night 2020. Sent to PHX for Day'Ron Sharpe the following summer.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jay Scrubb
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN's own 2020 2nd-round pick (#55). Draft rights sent to LAC in Shamet 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Saddiq Bey
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #19 by BKN, immediately sent to DET in Shamet 3-team trade. Never played for Nets.

assetsGivenUp.name: Dzanan Musa
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN's 2018 1st-round pick. Sent to DET in Shamet 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jaylen Hands
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN's 2019 2nd-round pick. Sent to DET in Shamet 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick via TOR
assetsGivenUp.note: Toronto's 2021 2nd-round pick. Sent to DET in Shamet 3-team trade. DET used it to draft JT Thor.
